doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_const_euler_bs_clear (mpfr/src/const_euler.c L62-L71). Deallocates the 6 mpz_t fields in a binary-splitting state struct used by the Euler-Mascheroni constant computation.

C body calls mpz_clear on each of the 6 fields.

The TS port: BigInt is GC-managed; nothing to free. Returns a fully-zeroed state {P: 0n, Q: 0n, T: 0n, C: 0n, D: 0n, V: 0n} as the closest immutable analog to 'object cleared'.

INTERNAL helper, not part of the public API. Lives in src/internal/mpfr/.

Class 'misc'. Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply -- input domain is any well-formed BS state.
divergence_from_c: Three divergences: (1) C `static` -> TS internal; (2) C void (mutates) -> TS object (returns zeroed state); (3) C frees mpz_t fields; TS has GC, so the operation reduces to producing the zeroed state.
refs: mpfr/src/const_euler.c L62-L71 -- the C reference body.
